name: n8n-workflow-builder
description: The complete n8n workflow toolkit. 7 commands, 5 agents, 1,396 nodes. Build workflows from plain English. Claude-in-the-Middle: use Claude as a free AI processing node inside workflows with parallel batch agents. Interactive UI with AskUserQuestion. Guided setup writes .mcp.json and .env automatically. Credential management via REST API. Testing, docs, audit, components, stateful patterns.
